title: ValidationCacheEntry
description: A single entry in the content-addressed validation cache (validation-cache.jsonl).

cacheKey.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonicalized check inputs, schemas, and script fingerprints.

checkId.description: Canonical name of the validation check (e.g. 'schema-validate:team-state').

inputFingerprints.description: SHA-256 hash of each material input used by the check.

scriptFingerprints.description: SHA-256 hash of each supporting script at cache-write time.

cachedAtUtc.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the entry was created.

implementationVersion.description: Cache implementation version for migration tracking.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds (legacy field, alias of ttlSeconds).

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds for this cache entry.
